reasoning: The reference price on 2025-08-31 is the Friday close from August 29, which YFinance reports as 224.36. According to recent news, this slide was driven by concerns over AI costs and job cuts, causing the stock to firmly break its 20-day Simple Moving Average (SMA), turning it into a resistance level. This establishes a strong negative short-term technical momentum, with analysts anticipating it may drop further to find support near $200. Because of this immediate downward pressure, the short-term resolutions (7 days, 1 month) are heavily shaded below 50% (0.45 and 0.47), despite the lower 224.36 baseline making it easier to overcome than the peak. Over the 3-month and 6-month horizons, historical positive drift in equities begins to assert itself, counteracting the bearish momentum, but the narrative pivot regarding elevated multiples (P/S of 12x) restrains overly bullish forecasts. Therefore, longer-term estimates smoothly approach maximum uncertainty at 0.5.
